{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":55422,"duration_api_ms":44393,"ttft_ms":2393,"ttft_stream_ms":1094,"time_to_request_ms":48,"num_turns":13,"result":"Three main I/O schedulers exist in this repo:

| Scheduler | Philosophy | Dispatch Entry Point |
|-----------|-----------|----------------------|
| **mq-deadline** | Ensures requests don't miss deadlines by expiring reads/writes after time limits and preventing writer starvation. | `dd_dispatch_request()` — block/mq-deadline.c:452 |
| **kyber** | Controls latency by throttling queue depths using scalable techniques and dividing work into request-type domains. | `kyber_dispatch_request()` — block/kyber-iosched.c:789 |
| **bfq** | Proportional-share scheduler that assigns sector-based budgets to processes and guarantees throughput proportional to weight while optimizing low latency for interactive applications. | `bfq_dispatch_request()` — block/bfq-iosched.c:5298 |

All three are registered as `.dispatch_request` callbacks in their respective `elevator_mq_ops` structures (confirmed at mq-deadline.c:994, kyber-iosched.c:1008, bfq-iosched.c:7597).","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"e8900df3-5cf0-47d3-81bb-bb1917feefb6","total_cost_usd":0.1194185,"usage":{"input_tokens":106,"cache_creation_input_tokens":26897,"cache_read_input_tokens":517685,"output_tokens":2750,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":26897,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":8,"output_tokens":585,"cache_read_input_tokens":48074,"cache_creation_input_tokens":247,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":247},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":106,"outputTokens":2750,"cacheReadInputTokens":517685,"cacheCreationInputTokens":26897,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.1194185,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"9651cf02-7065-4578-a49f-4b77bd0f060f"}
